title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0805
summary: 1 The National Labor Relations Board issued a complaint on March 27, 1950, following a charge filed August 3, 1949, by the International Woodworkers of America, Local 6—7, against respondent, Dant & Russell, Ltd.
